text:
{
  "isSuspicious": true,
  "deviation": "PowerShell executed with a hidden window and an encoded command by wscript.exe, which is a common tactic for stealthy malicious script execution. The encoded command starts with a PowerShell version check, often a prelude to further malicious actions. Registry key creation under SystemCertificates and Policies by this process adds to the suspicion.",
  "indicators": [
    "wscript.exe parent of powershell.exe",
    "powershell.exe -noP (NoProfile)",
    "powershell.exe -w 1 (WindowStyle Hidden)",
    "powershell.exe -enc (EncodedCommand)",
    "Base64 encoded command",
    "Registry key creation under SystemCertificates",
    "Registry key creation under Policies"
  ]
}
